title: Medicare Advantage vs. Medigap
metaDescription: Compare Medicare Advantage vs. Medigap. See side-by-side costs, benefits, eligibility, and which option is best for your situation in 2026.
introText: Choosing between Medicare Advantage and Medigap is one of the most important decisions seniors face. This guide breaks down the key differences to help you make an informed choice.

optionB.name: Medigap
optionB.description: Supplement to Original Medicare with more flexibility

whoShouldChooseA: Medicare Advantage may be the better choice if you prioritize simplicity and lower upfront costs.
whoShouldChooseB: Medigap may be better if you want maximum flexibility and comprehensive coverage.

costComparison.description: Costs depend on your specific situation, location, and health needs.

bottomLine: Both Medicare Advantage and Medigap serve important roles. The best choice depends on your health needs, budget, and personal preferences. Consider consulting with a licensed professional before making a decision.

faqs.question: What is the main difference between Medicare Advantage and Medigap?
faqs.answer: Medicare Advantage is all-in-one plan with network restrictions, while Medigap is supplement to original medicare with more flexibility.

faqs.question: How do I decide which option is right for me?
faqs.answer: Consider your health needs, budget, preferred providers, and long-term care goals. Speaking with a licensed insurance agent or counselor can help you make the best choice.
